title: The Call of Duty movie will premiere in 2028 according to new reports
summary: The film adaptation of the popular video game advances with a planned release date.

title: IO Interactive details what the James Bond 007 First Light game was like before it was canceled
summary: The studio explains that the original project was an ensemble game closer to Mission: Impossible than to Bond films.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker will have a physical edition and its director defends the unique experience for each player
summary: The new role-playing game from the director of The Witcher 3 will arrive on disc and intentionally allow each player to have a different experience.

title: The video game Wuthering Waves will have an animated series titled Elysium
summary: The game developer announced the animated project along with the creation of the Kuro Onroad studio.

title: Marathon director Joe Ziegler leaves Bungie after massive layoffs
summary: The departure of the director of the anticipated shooter adds to a series of problems at the studio.

title: Magic: The Gathering announces The Hobbit cards and reveals all its sets for 2027
summary: The popular collectible card game franchise presents new cards based on the works of J.R.R. Tolkien and its release schedule for 2027.

title: ZA/UM to conduct more layoffs two months after the launch of Zero Parades
summary: The studio behind Disco Elysium faces a new round of mass layoffs amid controversies.

title: Valve warns memory prices will keep rising and there is no end in sight
summary: The gaming giant points out that the price crisis in RAM and SSDs will worsen rather than improve.

title: Actress Jennifer English resigns from a new game due to health issues
summary: Known for her role in Baldur's Gate 3 and Clair Obscur, she withdraws from an upcoming fantasy project on medical advice.

title: Amazon's God of War series will replace the actor playing Kratos due to an injury on set
summary: The production of the video game adaptation undergoes a change of protagonist due to an accident during filming.

title: Bethesda surprises with positive announcement about the future of Starfield
summary: Contrary to rumors of abandonment, the company confirms that the space game continues to have active support and new content in development.

title: Bethesda shares confirmed details and speculations about Fallout 5
summary: The new title in the post-apocalyptic saga begins to take shape with official information although still without a release date.

title: Rumors of a Zelda remake keep fans on edge
summary: Fans are demanding official confirmation in light of leaks pointing to a reissue of a classic in the saga.

title: The live-action adaptation of Naruto reveals new production details
summary: The project advances with information about its approach, generating expectations and caution among anime fans.

title: Sony announces regional PlayStation Store prices in Latin America, causing disappointment in Mexico
summary: The new prices adjusted to local currency do not meet the expectations of Mexican players, who were hoping for more competitive offers.

title: An exclusive Pokémon Go Mewtwo is auctioned for up to $10,000
summary: The Pokémon caught in a special raid in Times Square is being sold on auction sites for astronomical prices.

title: GameStop acquires almost 10% of eBay in a hostile takeover plan that bewilders the market
summary: The video game retail chain takes an unexpected financial step by becoming one of the largest shareholders of the auction platform.

title: Taco Bell publishes a viral apology in the Notes app for its gastrointestinal issues
summary: The fast-food chain tries to win back its customers with a humorous apology statement after complaints of food poisoning.

title: Nintendo patents a dock for Switch 2 compatible with the original console
summary: The new patent suggests that the dock for the next console will allow using both Switch 2 and Switch 1, improving the gaming experience.

title: Square Enix releases a commemorative trailer for the 25th anniversary of Final Fantasy X
summary: The video reviews the most emblematic moments of the classic RPG celebrating a quarter century since its release.
